commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Arise, get you down quickly from here; for your people whom you have brought forth out of Egypt have corrupted themselves; they have quickly turned aside out of the way which I commanded them; they have made them a molten image. Have quickly. Hebrew, "have become corrupt; they have quickly abandoned the way which I commanded them. "(Haydock) Septuagint, "the people hath sinned. They have quickly transgressed "(Calmet) Idol. Protestants have "image. "The Hebrews had called the similitude of a calf their god, Exodus xxxii.
